# PdfPix

> Free browser-based PDF tools for merging, splitting, compressing, converting, editing, protecting, and organizing PDF files.

Canonical site: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/
Sitemap: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/sitemap.xml
Contact: mailto:support@pdfpix.com

## Core pages
- Home: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/
- About: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/about/
- Pricing: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pricing/
- Privacy: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/privacy/
- Terms: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/terms/
- Contact: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/contact/

## Popular tools
- Merge PDF: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/merge-pdf/
- Split PDF: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/split-pdf/
- Compress PDF: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/compress-pdf/
- PDF to Word: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pdf-to-word/
- Word to PDF: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/word-to-pdf/
- PDF to JPG: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pdf-to-jpg/
- JPG to PDF: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/jpg-to-pdf/
- OCR PDF: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/ocr-pdf/
- Protect PDF: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/protect-pdf/
- Redact PDF: https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/redact-pdf/

## Product notes
- PdfPix emphasizes privacy-first, browser-based processing.
- The site focuses on direct workflows without account creation.
- Tool pages include FAQ and how-to content for common document tasks.
